threshold_count: Presence of obsessions, compulsions, or both
duration_rule: Symptoms occupy at least 1 hour per day

symptoms.description: The patient experiences recurrent and persistent thoughts, urges, or images that are experienced as intrusive and unwanted, causing marked anxiety or distress.
The patient engages in repetitive behaviors or mental acts that they feel driven to perform in response to an obsession or according to rigid rules.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Preoccupation with 1 or more perceived physical flaws plus repetitive behaviors or mental acts

symptoms.description: The patient is preoccupied with one or more perceived defects or flaws in their physical appearance that are unobservable or appear slight to others.
The patient performs repetitive behaviors or mental acts, such as mirror checking or excessive grooming, in response to their appearance concerns.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Overwhelming urge to accumulate plus distress when trying to discard items

symptoms.description: The patient experiences persistent difficulty discarding or parting with possessions, regardless of their actual value.
The patient experiences clinically significant distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to difficulty discarding possessions.
The patient accumulates possessions that congest and clutter active living areas, substantially compromising their intended use.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Repeated hair pulling resulting in hair loss plus repeated attempts to stop

symptoms.description: The patient repeatedly pulls out their own hair, resulting in noticeable hair loss.
The patient makes repeated, unsuccessful attempts to decrease or stop their hair-pulling behavior.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Repeated skin picking resulting in lesions plus repeated attempts to stop

symptoms.description: The patient recurrently picks at their skin, resulting in skin lesions.
The patient has made repeated, unsuccessful attempts to decrease or stop their skin-picking behavior.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

diagnosis_name: Obsessive–Compulsive and Related Disorder Due to Another Medical Condition
threshold_count: Obsessions, compulsions, or other related symptoms predominant in the clinical picture
duration_rule: Not specified (physiological consequence of medical condition)

symptoms.description: The patient experiences prominent obsessions, compulsions, or other obsessive-compulsive related symptoms.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Obsessions, compulsions, or other related symptoms predominant in the clinical picture
duration_rule: During or soon after intoxication or withdrawal

symptoms.description: The patient experiences prominent obsessions, compulsions, or other obsessive-compulsive related symptoms.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

diagnosis_name: Other Specified Obsessive–Compulsive and Related Disorder
threshold_count: Clinically important symptoms that fall below threshold for defined disorders

symptoms.description: The patient exhibits clinically important obsessive-compulsive symptoms that fall below the diagnostic threshold.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Obsessive-compulsive symptoms present but insufficient information for a specific diagnosis

symptoms.description: The patient presents with obsessive-compulsive symptoms, but there is insufficient information to make a specific diagnosis.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.
